tasks.subject: Scaffold monorepo structure
tasks.description: Create root package.json with npm workspaces, directory structure under packages/, .npmrc for @unipi scope, .gitignore

tasks.subject: Implement @unipi/core
tasks.description: Create events.ts, constants.ts, utils.ts, index.ts for @unipi/core package. Event type definitions, shared constants, utility helpers.

tasks.subject: Implement @unipi/workflow extension
tasks.description: Create index.ts with command registration for all 12 workflow commands. Commands dispatch to skills. Emits MODULE_READY event. Listens for ralph presence.

tasks.subject: Create workflow skills (12 SKILL.md files)
tasks.description: Create SKILL.md files for: brainstorm, plan, work, review-work, consolidate, worktree-create, consultant, quick-work, gather-context, document, scan-issues, worktree-merge

tasks.subject: Implement @unipi/ralph
tasks.description: Port pi-ralph-wiggum to unipi pattern. Add event emission (MODULE_READY, RALPH_LOOP_START/END). Create index.ts, ralph-loop.ts, tools.ts, SKILL.md.

tasks.subject: Create unipi meta-package and verify publish
tasks.description: Create meta-package README, verify npm publish dry-run works for all packages.
